overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character standing on a coastal cliff during a vibrant sunset. The camera orbits around the character revealing a traditional Japanese pagoda, then follows as the character turns and walks inland toward a wooden shrine as night falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal cliff overlooking ocean at sunset

agents.ego_description: samurai character stands motionless on cliff edge, gazing out at the ocean waves and setting sun

entered.detail: vast blue ocean with white wave crests stretching to the horizon
jagged brown rocks forming the cliff edge where the character stands
bright golden sun low on the horizon casting intense light across the water
large rock formation visible in the water near the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast ocean. The sun is setting on the left, casting golden light across the water. The camera slowly pans right around the stationary character, showing the waves crashing against the rocks below under a clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff with traditional pagoda overlooking ocean

events.description: traditional stone pagoda enters view from the left, silhouetted against the bright sun
sun dips lower toward horizon, sky transitions to deeper pink and purple hues

agents.ego_description: character remains stationary while camera pans to reveal the pagoda structure and colorful sunset sky

entered.detail: traditional Japanese two-tiered stone pagoda with curved roof edges
wind-swept pine trees growing on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, a traditional stone pagoda is revealed silhouetted against the brilliant sunset. The sky transforms into dramatic streaks of pink and purple as the sun descends toward the ocean. The pagoda stands prominently on the cliff edge while waves continue to break below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hilltop with wooden shrine building at nightfall

events.description: character turns away from the ocean view and begins walking inland toward wooden structures
sun sets completely below horizon, sky darkens to night with stars becoming visible

agents.ego_description: character turns and walks away from the cliff edge toward a wooden shrine building as darkness falls and stars appear

entered.detail: traditional dark wooden Japanese building with tiled roof on the hilltop
dark smoke rising into the sky from a fire in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the sunset and walks inland along the rocky cliff top. A wooden shrine building comes into view on the left as the last light fades and the sky fills with stars. Black smoke rises in the distance against the night sky as the character approaches the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a golden coastal sunset into a starlit night landscape. It begins with a samurai standing on a rocky cliff edge, as the camera pans right to capture waves crashing against the shore under the warm glow of a setting sun. As the camera shifts its perspective, a traditional stone pagoda is revealed in silhouette against a sky transforming into dramatic streaks of pink and purple. The scene then follows the character as they turn away from the ocean and walk inland, with the light fading into a starry night that reveals a wooden shrine on the left. Finally, the camera tracks the character toward the structure as plumes of black smoke rise in the distance against the dark sky.
